info.description: Board grid on /investor-relations. Upload a headshot and bio for each director.

name.description: Full name shown on the card.

role.description: Board title shown under the name, e.g. Independent Director.

headshot.description: Headshot photo. Square images look best.

bio.description: Short biography shown on the director card.

independent.description: Tick if this director is an independent (non-executive) board member.

order.description: Display order on the page (lower numbers show first).

alsoOnTeam.description: Optional: link to the matching Leadership Team entry if this person also appears there.
